Player Participation & Settlement Criteria
If Xavier Edwards is scratched or not included in the starting lineup, the market will resolve to the fair market price.

If Xavier Edwards is not in the starting lineup but later enters the game, the market will resolve to the fair market price, pinch hit at bats will not count towards the market.
If Xavier Edwards is in the starting lineup and records at least one plate appearance the market will settle based on total hits + runs + rbis recorded.
